title: zigara tenuis
side_effects: Zigara tenuis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. In rare cases, the improper use of Zigara tenuis can cause an imbalance in blood sugar levels, resulting in hypoglycemia or hyperglycemia. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to liver and kidney damage, making it essential to use the plant under the guidance of a medical professional.
